items.label: New Project
items.description: Create a new empty project

items.label: New Project from Template
items.description: Start a new project from a template

items.label: Close Project
items.description: Close the current project and return to the welcome screen

items.label: Quit
items.description: Exit Futureboard Studio

items.label: Open MIDI Editor
items.description: Open the floating MIDI editor window for the selected clip

items.label: Select All Notes
items.description: Select all notes in the MIDI editor

items.label: Delete Selected Notes
items.description: Delete selected MIDI notes

items.label: Duplicate Selected Notes
items.description: Duplicate selected MIDI notes

items.label: Quantize
items.description: Snap selected (or all) notes to the grid

items.label: Fit Notes
items.description: Fit the piano roll view to the notes in the clip

items.label: Nudge Left
items.description: Nudge selected notes one grid step earlier

items.label: Nudge Right
items.description: Nudge selected notes one grid step later

items.label: Transpose Up
items.description: Transpose selected notes up one semitone

items.label: Transpose Down
items.description: Transpose selected notes down one semitone

items.label: Transpose Up One Octave
items.description: Transpose selected notes up one octave

items.label: Transpose Down One Octave
items.description: Transpose selected notes down one octave

items.label: Enable MIDI Devices
items.description: Request Web MIDI access and list connected MIDI devices

items.label: Refresh MIDI Devices
items.description: Re-enumerate all connected MIDI inputs and outputs

items.label: Add MIDI Track
items.description: Add a new MIDI track routed to All MIDI Inputs

items.label: Enable Audio Input
items.description: Request microphone permission and enumerate audio devices

items.label: Refresh Audio Devices
items.description: Re-enumerate all connected audio input and output devices

items.label: Add Volume Automation
items.description: Add a volume automation lane to the selected track

items.label: Add Pan Automation
items.description: Add a pan automation lane to the selected track

items.label: Pointer Tool
items.description: Select and move clips

items.label: Pen Tool
items.description: Draw new clips

items.label: Cut Tool
items.description: Split clips

items.label: Glue Tool
items.description: Join adjacent clips

items.label: Mute Tool
items.description: Toggle clip mute

items.label: Time Tool
items.description: Time-stretch clips

items.label: Automation Tool
items.description: Edit automation lanes
